label: What-If Slider
description: BTC price shock slider with estimated P&L via delta and gamma approximation. Instant scenario sensitivity.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard (widget computes from portfolioGreeks which requires API data).

0.7.note: — widget is a pure interactive control with numeric defaults (btcPriceChangePct=0, estimatedPnl=0); no data array to be empty.

0.8.note: applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 pass — availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 fix applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard (widget computes from portfolioGreeks which requires API data). 0.7 N/A — widget is a pure interactive control with numeric defaults (btcPriceChangePct=0, estimatedPnl=0); no data array to be empty. 0.8 fix applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

1.1.note: — reads btcPriceChangePct, setBtcPriceChangePct, estimatedPnl, portfolioGreeks, portfolioGreeksData exclusively from useRiskData() hook.

1.2.note: — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); isBatchMode derived from scope.mode; portfolioGreeks from scoped API.

1.3.note: — org scope reduces scopeReductionFactor which scales VaR/risk metrics that feed estimatedPnl.

1.6.note: — empty scope = full portfolio Greeks returned.

1.7.note: — no reference data; btcSpot=65000 is a display constant for dS calculation, not a reference data list.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — reads btcPriceChangePct, setBtcPriceChangePct, estimatedPnl, portfolioGreeks, portfolioGreeksData exclusively from useRiskData() hook. 1.2 pass — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); isBatchMode derived from scope.mode; portfolioGreeks from scoped API. 1.3 pass — org scope reduces scopeReductionFactor which scales VaR/risk metrics that feed estimatedPnl. 1.4 pass — clientIds threaded through scope. 1.5 pass — strategyIds threaded through scope. 1.6 pass — empty scope = full portfolio Greeks returned. 1.7 N/A — no reference data; btcSpot=65000 is a display constant for dS calculation, not a reference data list.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (live Greeks), paper ✓, batch ✓. Analysis tool — no execution. BTC spot price is currently hardcoded at $65,000.

3.2.note: isBatchMode in context; not used by this widget (no action buttons).

3.5.note: Paper mode: same estimation using paper Greeks.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: Range input calls setBtcPriceChangePct — real state handler. estimatedPnl computed from delta + gamma approximation.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.4 (slider movement updates estimated PnL in real time), 4.8 (widget fits in compact 2-row height).

5.1.note: Target strategies: options-bearing and delta-exposed strategies (defi-basis-trade, cefi-options-spread). Uses delta + gamma approximation: PnL ≈ delta*dS + 0.5*gamma*dS².

l5.notes: Human walkthrough required. BTC-only; no other spot price shocks yet.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: tests/widgets/risk/risk-what-if-slider.test.tsx — 17 tests covering loading/error/default render, slider onChange propagation to setBtcPriceChangePct, +/- prefix label logic, delta/gamma display from portfolioGreeks and portfolioGreeksData override. Per ui_widget_test_rollout_2026_04_24.md Phase 5.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors. accent-blue-500 is a Tailwind utility, not an arbitrary value.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: estimatedPnl computed in context (not in widget). No problematic deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[9px] replaced with text-micro/text-nano tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.2.note: No bracket spacing violations. min-w-[140px] on PnL display is a fixed width constraint, not a spacing token.

8.4.note: Added aria-label='BTC price change percentage' to range input.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=2 required (compact widget).

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2/8.3 pass. 8.4 fixed. 8.5 needs human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Unique slider-based what-if tool; no equivalent widget.

relationships.notes: btcPriceChangePct and estimatedPnl are context state shared with other risk widgets (Greeks used in calculation).

dataContract.notes: portfolioGreeks from usePortfolioGreeks() hook or fallback computed Greeks. btcSpot hardcoded at 65000 — should be API-sourced.

gaps: BTC spot price hardcoded at $65,000 — not live-sourced
Only BTC shock; no ETH/SOL/other asset shocks
coverage.notes: Delta + gamma approximation. Suitable for short-range shocks (-30% to +30%).

findings.description: L0.6: Added isLoading -> Spinner guard (was missing; greeks/portfolio data needed before slider is meaningful)
L0.7: N/A — pure interactive control, no data array empty state applicable
L0.8: Added hasError -> error message guard (was missing)
risk-what-if-slider-widget.tsx — ~8 user-visible strings (labels, slider range, footnote)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-what-if-slider-widget.tsx — text-[10px] on labels, text-[9px] on slider range marks and footnote
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed
Added aria-label='BTC price change percentage' to range input

findings.description: risk-what-if-slider-widget.tsx:35-36 — BTC-only shock (btcSpot hardcoded at 65000, only BTC delta/gamma considered). Portfolio also has ETH/SOL/other exposure per defiDeltaComposite, but slider ignores it. Limited usefulness for non-BTC-dominant portfolios.
findings.deferReason: Feature scope — widget label says 'BTC price shock'. Multi-asset version would need tab/select for underlying. Tracked for product decision.

findings.description: risk-what-if-slider-widget.tsx:35 and use-risk-page-data.ts:348 — btcSpot = 65000 is a hardcoded literal. Should come from market-data context (matches current BTC/USD tape) to keep the PnL estimate anchored to reality.
findings.deferReason: Duplicate literal in two places; needs market-data wiring. Tracked for BP-5.
